sections.positive: Your focus is laser-sharp today. You'll breeze through complex material and retain information easily. A surprise test or quiz will be handled with confidence. Your teachers will note your dedication.

sections.positive: A leadership vacuum appears, and you are perfectly positioned to fill it. Step up and take charge – your decisiveness will be appreciated. A quick decision today saves the company money.
